name: HPF Co.,Ltd
summary: HPF Co.,Ltd provides integrated logistics services primarily in China. The company's integrated logistics services include lean land transportation, warehousing, and international freight forwarding services; and operates as an airline agent for Shenzhen Airlines and Air China. It also provides financial and value-added services, including money collection, advance payment, warehouse receipts pledging, and supply chain commodity sales services, as well as product packaging and barcode, insurance agency, sorting and combination, and product inspection services for shippers. In addition, the company offers ordinary freight, logistics center, domestic trade, logistics information consultation, domestic freight forwarding, and supply chain management and related ancillary services; and engages in the self-operated, and agent import and export business of various commodities and technologies, as well as undertakes international shipping agency business for sea, air and, land transportation. Further, it provides information loading, general freight, equipment leasing, business process reengineering, and business innovation services. Additionally, the company researches, develops, produces, and sells tablet computers, network players, and other network peripheral electronic products. The company was formerly known as Shenzhen Huapengfei Modern Logistics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to HPF Co.,Ltd in July 2017. HPF Co.,Ltd was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
